fato_historico: 1927: Massacre of July 15, 1927: Eighty-nine protesters are killed by Austrian police in Vienna.
energia_do_dia: On this day, as the echoes of history remind us of the fragility of human unity, your empathetic heart acts as a gentle bridge. It is a good time to turn toward your inner circle. Perhaps your compassion can soften difficult edges, transforming collective shadows into a shared garden of resilience and hope where four-leaf clovers bloom.
frase_do_dia: Let your gentle spirit heal the world, one kindness at a time today.
significado_numero: Representing the strength of communal bonds and the power of memory.
conselho: Consider hosting a cozy gathering to cultivate joy and meaningful connections tonight.
